message:
feat(fwc): add CUAL agent ergonomics - tool schemas, tabular output, templates, validation

Implements multiple CUAL (CLI Universal Agent Access Layer) tracks:
- CUAL-A.1: OperationInfo-to-tool-schema codec (MCP/Claude/OpenAI formats)
- CUAL-A.2: Tool schema export from DiscoveredOperation for fwc CLI
- CUAL-E.3: Table/CSV/TSV/Markdown tabular output with column selection, sorting, limiting
- CUAL-E.4: NDJSON streaming format (one JSON object per line)
- CUAL-K.1: Deep schema navigator with required/optional/example annotations
- CUAL-K.2: Input payload template generator with scaffolded JSON
- CUAL-K.3: Pre-invoke input validation with human-readable error messages

Also fixes clippy issues in search.rs (public allows method) and schema_nav.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 clap = { workspace = true, features = ["derive", "env"] }

 fcp-manifest.workspace = true
+handlebars.workspace = true
+jaq-core = "2.2.1"
+jaq-json = { version = "1.1.3", features = ["serde_json"] }
+jaq-std = "2.1.2"
 serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json.workspace = true
 toml.workspace = true
